ayahArabic: ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
ayahEnglish: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].

ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And if they see a sign [i.e., miracle], they turn away and say, "Passing magic."

targetTranslation: a sign/miracle (object of يَرَوْا۟ - they see)
ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And if they see a sign [i.e., miracle], they turn away and say, "Passing magic."

ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And if they see a sign [i.e., miracle], they turn away and say, "Passing magic."

ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And if they see a sign [i.e., miracle], they turn away and say, "Passing magic."

ayahArabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And if they see a sign [i.e., miracle], they turn away and say, "Passing magic."

ayahArabic: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement.

targetTranslation: a matter/affair (that is owned by or connected to something else)
ayahArabic: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement.

ayahArabic: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
ayahEnglish: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
ayahEnglish: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence.

targetTranslation: a strong deterrent (in مَا فِيهِ - what is in it)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
ayahEnglish: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence.
distractors: (is a spring of) water to bathe

targetTranslation: a wisdom (which is described as بٰلِغَةٌ/far-reaching)
ayahArabic: حِكْمَةٌۢ بٰلِغَةٌ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahEnglish: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].

ayahArabic: حِكْمَةٌۢ بٰلِغَةٌ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahEnglish: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].

ayahArabic: حِكْمَةٌۢ بٰلِغَةٌ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahEnglish: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].

targetTranslation: on the day (when يَدْعُ the caller calls)
ayahArabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
ayahEnglish: So leave them, [O Muḥammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,

ayahArabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
ayahEnglish: So leave them, [O Muḥammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,

ayahArabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
ayahEnglish: So leave them, [O Muḥammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,

ayahArabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
ayahEnglish: So leave them, [O Muḥammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,

targetTranslation: in a state of being intensely humbled (describing أَبْصٰرُهُمْ - their eyes)
ayahArabic: خُشَّعًا أَبْصٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,

ayahArabic: خُشَّعًا أَبْصٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,

targetTranslation: they exit/are exiting (referring to the disbelievers emerging from their graves)
ayahArabic: خُشَّعًا أَبْصٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,

ayahArabic: خُشَّعًا أَبْصٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,

targetTranslation: scattered about (like locusts in this ayah)
ayahArabic: خُشَّعًا أَبْصٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,

targetTranslation: those who rush forward (describing their state while heading towards the caller)
ayahArabic: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ يَقُولُ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ هٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."

ayahArabic: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ يَقُولُ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ هٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."

ayahArabic: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ يَقُولُ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ هٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."

ayahArabic: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ يَقُولُ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ هٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."

targetTranslation: she denied/rejected (referring to قَوْمُ نُوحٍ - the people of Noah)
ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.

targetTranslation: before them (refers to the people of Noah who are mentioned right after this word)
ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.

targetTranslation: people, folk (subject of كَذَّبَتْ - they denied)
ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
ayahEnglish: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.

ayahArabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
ayahEnglish: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."

ayahArabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
ayahEnglish: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."

targetTranslation: doors/gates (object of فَفَتَحْنَآ - so we opened)
ayahArabic: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
ayahEnglish: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down

targetTranslation: being poured out forcefully (describing مَآءٍ/water, in a possessive/descriptive phrase)
ayahArabic: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
ayahEnglish: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down

targetTranslation: springs (as the object being burst forth)
ayahArabic: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
ayahEnglish: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.

targetTranslation: a matter/affair (possessed by something after it)
ayahArabic: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
ayahEnglish: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.

targetTranslation: it was determined (connected to أَمْرٍ - a matter/affair)
ayahArabic: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
ayahEnglish: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.

ayahArabic: وَحَمَلْنٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,

ayahArabic: وَحَمَلْنٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,

ayahArabic: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
ayahEnglish: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.

targetTranslation: as a reward (for مَن كَانَ كُفِرَ - whoever was rejected)
ayahArabic: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
ayahEnglish: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.

ayahArabic: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
ayahEnglish: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.

ayahArabic: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
ayahEnglish: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

targetTranslation: we made very easy (acted on القُرْءَانَ)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: ʿAad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

targetTranslation: The tribe of 'Ad (subject of كَذَّبَتْ - they denied)
ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: ʿAad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

targetTranslation: he/it was (describing how عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ - my punishment and warnings - were)
ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: ʿAad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: ʿAad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,

targetTranslation: of a day (possessed by نَحْسٍ - evil/disaster)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,

ayahArabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
ayahEnglish: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.

ayahArabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
ayahEnglish: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.

targetTranslation: a palm tree (being described as مُّنقَعِرٍ/uprooted)
ayahArabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
ayahEnglish: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.

targetTranslation: being uprooted (with emphasis, describing نَخْلٍ/palm trees)
ayahArabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
ayahEnglish: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.

ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahEnglish: Thamūd denied the warning.

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahEnglish: Thamūd denied the warning.

targetTranslation: Is it a mere human being? (expressing disbelief)
ayahArabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayahEnglish: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.

ayahArabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayahEnglish: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.

ayahArabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayahEnglish: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.

ayahArabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayahEnglish: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.

targetTranslation: was it thrown? (referring to الذِّكْرُ - the message)
ayahArabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

ayahArabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

ayahArabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

ayahArabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

targetTranslation: a reckless one (describing someone in the ayah who is making false claims)
ayahArabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

targetTranslation: tomorrow (object of سَيَعْلَمُونَ - they will know)
ayahArabic: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
ayahEnglish: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.

ayahArabic: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
ayahEnglish: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.

targetTranslation: ones who send (plural, subject of إِنَّا)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.

ayahArabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
ayahEnglish: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].

ayahArabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
ayahEnglish: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].

ayahArabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
ayahEnglish: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].

targetTranslation: a drinking portion/share (of الْمَآءَ - the water)
ayahArabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
ayahEnglish: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].

ayahArabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
ayahEnglish: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].
distractors: (is a spring of) water to bathe

targetTranslation: their companion (the one they called in فَنَادَوْا۟)
ayahArabic: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
ayahEnglish: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].

ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them one shriek [i.e., blast from the sky], and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.

targetTranslation: a single loud shout/cry (object of أَرْسَلْنَا)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them one shriek [i.e., blast from the sky], and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.

targetTranslation: one/single (describing the shout/blast in this ayah)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them one shriek [i.e., blast from the sky], and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

targetTranslation: she denied intensely/repeatedly (subject is قَوْمُ which is feminine singular grammatically)
ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahEnglish: The people of Lot denied the warning.

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahEnglish: The people of Lot denied the warning.

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahEnglish: The people of Lot denied the warning.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ نَّجَّيْنٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ نَّجَّيْنٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ نَّجَّيْنٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ نَّجَّيْنٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ نَّجَّيْنٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn.

ayahArabic: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا كَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
ayahEnglish: As favor from Us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.

ayahArabic: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا كَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
ayahEnglish: As favor from Us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.

targetTranslation: We reward/compensate (the one who شَكَرَ/was grateful)
ayahArabic: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا كَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
ayahEnglish: As favor from Us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.

ayahArabic: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا كَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
ayahEnglish: As favor from Us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.

targetTranslation: he was thankful (for نِّعْمَةً - a favor)
ayahArabic: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا كَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
ayahEnglish: As favor from Us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.

targetTranslation: he warned them (referring to the people of Lot in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning.

targetTranslation: they persistently tried to persuade him (about ضَيْفِهِ - his guests)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ رٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ رٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ رٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ رٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."

targetTranslation: he came upon them in morning time (subject of عَذَابٌ - punishment)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.

targetTranslation: early in the morning (describing when عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ happened)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahEnglish: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.

ayahArabic: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahEnglish: So taste My punishment and warning.

targetTranslation: We made very easy (subject of this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahEnglish: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahEnglish: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahEnglish: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.

ayahArabic: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
ayahEnglish: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.

targetTranslation: all of them (referring to آيٰتِنَا/our signs)
ayahArabic: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
ayahEnglish: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.

targetTranslation: seizing (of عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ - One Mighty and Powerful)
ayahArabic: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
ayahEnglish: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.

ayahArabic: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
ayahEnglish: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.

ayahArabic: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
ayahEnglish: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.

ayahArabic: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahEnglish: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scriptures?

ayahArabic: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahEnglish: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scriptures?

ayahArabic: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahEnglish: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scriptures?

ayahArabic: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahEnglish: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scriptures?

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?

targetTranslation: a united group (subject of نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ - we are a united victorious group)
ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?

ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
ayahEnglish: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.

ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
ayahEnglish: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness..

targetTranslation: day (object of يُسْحَبُونَ - they are dragged)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
ayahEnglish: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."

targetTranslation: they are being dragged (into النَّارِ/the Fire, on their faces)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
ayahEnglish: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."

targetTranslation: their faces (being dragged on in يُسْحَبُونَ)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
ayahEnglish: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."

targetTranslation: taste! (to a group) (command to those being dragged into the Fire)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
ayahEnglish: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
ayahEnglish: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."

targetTranslation: Saqar (a name of Hell meaning 'the intensely burning fire')
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
ayahEnglish: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."

ayahArabic: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.

targetTranslation: we created it (referring to كُلَّ شَىْءٍ - everything)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
ayahEnglish: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
ayahEnglish: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?

targetTranslation: your followers/companions (object of أَهْلَكْنَآ - we destroyed)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?

targetTranslation: one who really takes heed (after مِن)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahEnglish: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?

ayahArabic: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahEnglish: And everything they did is in written records.

targetTranslation: they did it (referring to everything mentioned in وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ)
ayahArabic: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahEnglish: And everything they did is in written records.

ayahArabic: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
ayahEnglish: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.

ayahArabic: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
ayahEnglish: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.
distractors: (is a spring of) water to bathe

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّاتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,

ayahArabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
ayahEnglish: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.

ayahArabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
ayahEnglish: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.

targetTranslation: in the presence of (of مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ)
ayahArabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
ayahEnglish: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.

targetTranslation: a mighty king (in the presence of مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ - All-Powerful)
ayahArabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
ayahEnglish: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.

targetTranslation: one who possesses complete power (in a perfect way)
ayahArabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
ayahEnglish: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.
